title: The Fight Against Katakuri Begins
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Katakuri, Unknown person #7, Brûlée, Unknown person #8 as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: iced tea will do, then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How Magnan- Imous!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Today's Merienda is chocolate and whipped cream donuts, Lord dogtooth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Sugar is the well- spring of strength!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I shall intake these nutrients. Not a soul is to enter my shrine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course! Who would dare disturb you?! Please, take your time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one has ever seen Lord dogtooth eat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a delicate soul. A meal is when a man lets down the walls around himself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He makes even the tea times he ought to spend in the carefree company of others...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: into solitary, stoic, composed supplements of nutrients.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Such is the man who holds up the big mom pirates themselves, the 1 billion bounty himself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: BAA BAAAH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Whaaa-?! straw hat?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How in the world did you get out of that huge mound of Mochi?!

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: I freak- ing hate eating Mochi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on?! What's with my fights with this pirate crew?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Can I not win without eating?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Where'd he go?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: L- Lord Dogtoothi has...

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: He's left mirror it world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He had some important business, and...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can feel the voice of a strong person from inside there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Crap! Observation Haki!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's eating donuts, isn't he?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Sniff sniff

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is that Haki too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's sittin' pretty on his victory, isn't he?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't be Silly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Dogtooth is conversing inside that shrine with both himself and the spirit of war itself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a sacred ritual! No one can interfere!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where are you running off to?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wahaha! You fool! I guess you're just the Measly Captain of a second- rate crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HAA- HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's burnt off his fat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WAHA- AA-?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, does the human body even work that way?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Alright! I'm ready to go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stop! Do not approach the shrine!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Elephant Gun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WAA- AAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Lord dogtooth, I am so very so-

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 43 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
